message: Delegating to Mcu Factory Verification Agent...

message.content: Stage 3 complete ✅ — design root generated, all 19 artifact validations passed. Advancing to Stage 4.

function.arguments: {"command": "plan", "stage_list": [{"id": "S1", "name": "Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory", "status": "done", "owner": "mcu_factory_requirements", "notes": "Complete. 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, 1 ADC, 3 I2C, 17 IPs linked."}, {"id": "S2", "name": "Verification Planning", "status": "done", "owner": "mcu_factory_verification_planning", "notes": "Complete. 97 checklist items, 21 scenario YAMLs, scenario_manifest.yaml, checklist.md + .html."}, {"id": "S3", "name": "Generation (nc_chipgen generate)", "status": "done", "owner": "mcu_factory_generation", "notes": "Complete. Design root: mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/. Exit code 0. All artifacts validated."}, {"id": "S4", "name": "Verification Execution (nc_chipgen verify)", "status": "in_progress", "owner": "mcu_factory_verification", "notes": "Run nc_chipgen verify --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu --all --coverage --nc-lib-root ip/"}, {"id": "S5", "name": "Verification Review + Dashboard + Advisory", "status": "planned", "owner": "mcu_factory_verification_reviewer", "notes": "Review evidence, update checklist, run MCU Factory Verification Review Advisory."}, {"id": "S6", "name": "Physical Design (PnR)", "status": "planned", "owner": "chipgen_pnr", "notes": "Place-and-route, GDS generation, signoff."}]}
function.name: stage_tracker

function.arguments: {"agent": "mcu_factory_verification", "task": "Run nc_chipgen verify --all --coverage on the mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu design root and produce evidence-backed verification outputs.", "inputs": {"project_root": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526", "design_name": "mspm33c321a_derivative", "design_root": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu", "nc_lib_root": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip", "verification_manifest": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/manifest.yaml", "scenarios_dir": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/", "scenario_count": 21, "checklist_path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_checklist.md", "required_outputs": ["/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_report.md", "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_summary.md"], "required_command": "nc_chipgen verify --design-root /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu --all --coverage --nc-lib-root /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip", "acceptance_criteria": ["nc_chipgen verify command must be executed (with --all --coverage flags)", "verification_report.md must be produced with pass/fail evidence referencing real logs/artifacts", "verification_summary.md must be produced", "Coverage output path must exist when coverage is requested"], "instruction": "Use project-derived paths only. Run nc_chipgen verify with --all and --coverage flags. Inspect the generated design root and verification logs for real evidence. Document all test outcomes with references to actual log files and artifact paths."}}
function.name: delegate_to_agent

acceptance_criteria: nc_chipgen verify command must be executed (with --all --coverage flags)
verification_report.md must be produced with pass/fail evidence referencing real logs/artifacts
Coverage output path must exist when coverage is requested
inputs.instruction: Use project-derived paths only. Run nc_chipgen verify with --all and --coverage flags. Inspect the generated design root and verification logs for real evidence. Document all test outcomes with references to actual log files and artifact paths.
inputs.task: Run nc_chipgen verify --all --coverage on the mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu design root and produce evidence-backed verification outputs.
